brand-story-1.query: ◆ Our Story Made slowly, worn often. Velmora was started with one belief: that fine jewelry shouldn't live in a safe. Every piece is designed in our small studio in Lisbon and crafted in 18k gold plating over brass, so it can be worn — really worn — from a Tuesday morning to a Saturday wedding.
